meal_site_name: India Community Center at West Valley
feature__transportation_description: Transportation support for older adults that qualify.
meal_site_detailed_description: The senior dining program offers hot meals for people 60 and over, and in some cases, their caregivers, spouses, and/or persons with disabilities.
site_status: Meals offered for indoor dining Monday, Tuesday, Thursday, and Friday. Contact site for more information.

feature__transportation_description: Transportation support for older adults that qualify.
meal_site_detailed_description: The senior dining program offers hot meals for people 60 and over, and in some cases, their caregivers, spouses, and/or persons with disabilities.
site_status: Meals offered for indoor dining Monday - Saturday. Neighborhood Meals on Wheels limited delivery within 4 miles of VASC. Contact site for more information.
